name: Garden Party leather handbag
description:
Recent photos are provided; the condition of the bag is as shown in the photos. Warehouse number: Bridge120
There may be minor scratches, stains, wrinkles, and dents on the bag's exterior, interior lining, hardware, and bottom edges. Please refer to the photos for details. All photos are taken in a real environment and include accompanying accessories.
Before the bag is shipped, our professional department will perform complimentary maintenance and cleaning services to ensure it reaches you in the best possible condition. This includes, but is not limited to, repairing worn areas and polishing the hardware. All these services will be completed before shipment. Rest assured, these services will not affect the bag's functionality.
Please note: The colour of the item may vary slightly due to differences in lighting and monitors.
If you have any questions or need a quote, please feel free to contact us. Happy shopping!
Hermes Garden Party 30 in pomegranate red, size: 30*21*13cm
